avx:
VMOVDQU64 zmm0, [rsi]        ; load 512-bit input (64 bytes)
VPXORQ    zmm1, zmm1, zmm1   ; zero mask
VMOVDQU64 [rdi], zmm0        ; identity store to output

VPCMPQ    k1, zmm0, zmm_kb, 4    ; k1 = (tokens != kb_entries)
VPCOMPRESSQ [rdi]{k1}, zmm0       ; compress mismatches → output

VDPBF16PS zmm_sim, zmm_query, zmm_corpus  ; BF16 dot-product
VREDUCEPS zmm_norm, zmm_sim, 0              ; L2 normalize (AVX-512F §VREDUCEPS)

VPANDQ    zmm_out, zmm_input, zmm_rules    ; AND ruleset
VPCMPQ    k_pass, zmm_out, zmm_rules, 0    ; k_pass = eq mask
VMOVDQU64 zmm_result{k_pass}, zmm_input    ; conditional merge

VBROADCASTSS zmm_w, dword ptr [rip+weight_07]  ; broadcast 0.7
VFMADD231PS  zmm_logic, zmm_empathy, zmm_w     ; zmm_logic = 0.7*logic+empathy

VMULPS    zmm_opt, zmm_logic, zmm_emo    ; element-wise product
VABSPS    zmm_bal, zmm_opt               ; abs balance score
VHADDPS   ymm_sum, ymm_bal, ymm_bal      ; horizontal sum (AVX §VHADDPS)

VCMPPS    k_pos, zmm_sent, zmm_thresh, 14  ; k_pos = (sent > 0.5)
KTESTW    k_pos, k_pos                      ; test all-positive
JZ        retry_label                        ; jump if any lane <= 0.5

VCVTPS2UDQ zmm_u, zmm_result              ; float -> uint32
VPANDQ     zmm_ok, zmm_u, zmm_phys_mask   ; mask physical constraints

VCMPPS    k_mean, zmm_meaning, zmm_zero, 14    ; meaning > 0
VPBLENDMD zmm_safe{k_mean}, zmm_result, zmm_0  ; zero nihilistic parts
VMOVDQU64 zmm_ego, [rsi + user_profile_offset]  ; load physical self
VMOVDQU64 zmm_ideal, [rsi + dream_profile_offset] ; load dream self

VBROADCASTSS zmm_half, dword ptr [rip + weight_05]  ; 0.5
VFMADD231PS  zmm_true, zmm_ego,   zmm_half          ; ego*0.5
VADDPS       zmm_true, zmm_true,  zmm_ideal
VADDPS       zmm_true, zmm_true,  zmm_ai_ans

VPMULUDQ  zmm_le,  zmm_logic, zmm_empathy  ; 64-bit product
VPOPCNTQ  zmm_coh, zmm_le                   ; population count (AVX-512 BITALG)

VSQRTPS zmm_depth, zmm_pain               ; sqrt of pain vector
VMULPS  zmm_emo,   zmm_depth, zmm_resonance ; weight by resonance

VMULPS zmm_h, zmm_logic_out, zmm_emo_out
; tanh via Intel SVML (short vector math library)
; VCALL  _mm512_tanh_ps   ; (SVML intrinsic, links with -lsvml)

VMOVDQU8  zmm_chars, [rsi + text_offset]     ; 64-char block load
VMOVDQU8  [rdi + display_offset], zmm_chars  ; write to display buffer

VPANDQ   zmm_rational, zmm_wisdom, zmm_severity
VPOPCNTQ zmm_gaps,     zmm_rational
